_README: These are PAID third-party services. The axis-core plugin does not require
any of them. Enable individually only if your organization already uses the
vendor and you have an account / API key.
To use a server: copy ONE of the entries below into your project's
./.mcp.json (NOT into the plugin), set the env var, and reload Claude Code.
AXIS-26 principle 5: tool-portable, vendor-replaceable. None of these
vendors is endorsed; substitutes are listed in Appendix D.3.
All server packages below must exist and be installable from npm.
Verify the package name and command flags against current vendor docs
before depending on them in CI.

linear._purpose: Optional gateway sync (AXIS-26 §7.3). Repository remains canonical.
linear._alternatives: Jira, GitHub Projects, none (repo is sufficient).

braintrust._alternatives: Promptfoo (open source, free), LangSmith, Helicone, Langfuse, local pytest/jest.

snyk._purpose: SAST/DAST integration for G2 Validate deterministic checks (AXIS-26 §6.2).
snyk._alternatives: Semgrep (open source, free) — already used by hooks/pre-tool-use-cwe.sh; CodeQL; Sonar.
